tooltip.potionrelicsmod.absorptionrelic: Electrifies your heart to beat twice as fast.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.dolphinsgracerel: You are accompanied by the soul of a dolphin condensed into gold.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.fireresistancere: The fire inside you burns brighter then the heat around you.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.hasterelic: Blocks tremble under your pickaxe's might.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.invisibilityreli: Every cell in your body gains the iridophores of a chameleon.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.nightvisionrelic: Grants sight even in the darkest of nights.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.regenerationreli: Your wounds heal faster than you can feel their pain.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.saturationrelic: Just looking at the chicken on the plate fills your stomach.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.strengthrelic: Turns you into a one man army.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.swiftnessrelic: Muscle fibers contract at incredible speed.
